task: Evaluate whether the optimized prompt produces the target behavior.
non_prompt_requirements: Record schema, tool, context, runtime, provider state, parser, model parameter, or eval requirements that must accompany the prompt.

provider_runtime_assumptions.provider: model provider used in this eval
provider_runtime_assumptions.api_surface: chat, responses, function calling, batch, app runtime, or local harness
provider_runtime_assumptions.structured_output: schema, JSON mode, parser, or none
provider_runtime_assumptions.tool_loop_state: reasoning items, thought signatures, reasoning_content, tool messages, or none
provider_runtime_assumptions.reasoning_or_thinking_control: reasoning effort, thinking level, temperature, verbosity, or none

dynamic_context: Retrieved content, tool results, user data, or runtime state supplied at execution time
expected_behavior: Observable behavior the model output must satisfy
cost_latency_notes: Record token, latency, and reasoning/tool-call changes when available.
